articles.title: CISA directive for AI executive order to be released this week, Andersen says
articles.summary: The binding operational directive will focus in part on “vulnerability alleviation and vulnerability management,” Andersen said in remarks delivered at the TechNet Cyber conference in Baltimore.

articles.summary: CISA, the FBI, the NSA, the Department of Energy, and other US government partners are warning that hackers are targeting internet-exposed automatic tank gauge (ATG) systems used to monitor fuel and liquid storage tanks across various critical infrastructure sectors. [...]

articles.summary: Assume the breach. Zero-days keep shipping, AI is writing exploits faster than anyone patches, and "patch everything in time" stopped working years ago. articles.title: Microsoft 365 Android Apps Let Any App Steal Account Tokens via Leftover Debug Flag
articles.summary: A development flag left switched on in production builds of several Microsoft 365 Android apps disabled the check that limits account-token sharing to trusted Microsoft apps. Any other app on the same phone could ask for the signed-in user's token and get it, then read email, open files, browse the

articles.title: What 345 Days of Untested Exposure Looks Like at a Bank
articles.summary: A two-week penetration test can leave roughly 345 days of real-world exposure unvalidated. Sprocket Security explores why continuous testing is becoming critical as attack surfaces constantly change. [...]

articles.title: Autonomous AI Tool Finds 2-Year-Old RCE Flaw in Redis (CVE-2026-23479)
articles.summary: Redis has patched a use-after-free in its blocking-client code that lets an authenticated user run arbitrary OS commands on the machine hosting the database. articles.title: Kirki, Burst Statistics WordPress Plugin Flaws in Attackers’ Crosshairs

articles.title: Security of 100 AI Agents Tested and Ranked – What You Need to Know
articles.summary: The AI Risk Quadrant evaluates AI agents based on three factors: how vulnerable they are to compromise, the potential impact of a breach, and the strength of their security defenses. articles.title: Hackers Target Global Stock Exchange in Espionage Operation
